notes: Fills deck slot 7 (checklist, global, defaultTitle "RetroAchievements"). 113 rows = the RA main set (game 810, src-ra) from the achievements dataset; each row label=title, note=description + points.

Scope split with slot 8: this widget is the main set (src-ra, game 810); the Professor Oak Challenge subset (game 24140, src-ra-oak, 224 achievements) is the separate Oak Catch List (slot 8). No overlap — the two RA games partition the achievement namespace.
Achievement→guide-step linkage (which step earns each) is the ra-mapping pass's job; this checklist is the user-facing earn list.
